output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?production WHERE {
  wd:Q1444982 p:P1345 ?participation .
  ?participation ps:P1345 ?team .
  ?participation pq:P585 ?date .
  ?team p:P1314 ?engineParticipation .
  ?engineParticipation ps:P1314 ?engineMaker .
  ?engineParticipation pq:P585 ?engineDate .
  FILTER(year(?date) = year(?engineDate))
  FILTER(?engineMaker = wd:Q1256)
  wd:Q1256 wdt:P1511 ?production
}
output.formatted:
BMW produced 150000 motorcycles in 1999.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?production WHERE {
  wd:Q1444982 p:P1345 ?participation .
  ?participation ps:P1345 ?team .
  ?participation pq:P585 ?date .
  ?team p:P1314 ?engineParticipation .
  ?engineParticipation ps:P1314 ?engineMaker .
  ?engineParticipation pq:P585 ?engineDate .
  FILTER(year(?date) = year(?engineDate))
  FILTER(?engineMaker = wd:Q1256)
  wd:Q1256 wdt:P1511 ?production
}
```

args.sparql:
SELECT ?production WHERE {
  wd:Q1444982 p:P1345 ?participation .
  ?participation ps:P1345 ?team .
  ?participation pq:P585 ?date .
  
  ?team p:P1314 ?engineParticipation .
  ?engineParticipation ps:P1314 ?engineMaker .
  ?engineParticipation pq:P585 ?engineDate .
  
  FILTER (year(?date) = year(?engineDate))
  FILTER (?engineMaker = wd:Q1256)
  
  wd:Q1256 wdt:P1511 ?production
}

question: How many motorcycles are produced by the engine maker of the most recent year of Jimmy Vasser 's Indianapolis 500 team who partnered with BMW
